column1: Luis Arraez remains the model of consistency atop the Giants’ order, recording a hit in nearly 78% of games this season and drawing a favorable home matchup against Kyle Freeland. Heliot Ramos offers strong appeal as well, hitting safely in 75% of contests with a recent surge and the platoon edge. Mauricio Dubon and Casey Schmitt are also in play, but Arraez’s steady approach and reliability make him the clear top option for Beat The Streak selections tonight.
